task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the Nx Witness VMS interface at https://localhost:7001.

task_completion.description: Rotate the Server Room Camera 90 degrees
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the camera settings for the 'Server Room Camera', the image rotation or orientation setting is visibly set to 90 degrees (or 90 degrees clockwise).
The name of the camera is updated to 'Server Room Camera [Corridor]' in the camera settings input field or the VMS resource/device list.

In the camera settings for the 'Entrance Camera', the image rotation or orientation setting is visibly set to 270 degrees (or 270 degrees counter-clockwise / 90 degrees counter-clockwise depending on the UI label).
The name of the camera is updated to 'Entrance Camera [Corridor]' in the camera settings input field or the VMS resource/device list.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure the cameras
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nx Witness VMS web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, API scripts, or curl to apply the configurations.

integrity.description: Settings were modified in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The rotation and renaming actions must occur within the VMS camera settings panels or dialogs, not in a text editor, notes app, or unrelated text field.

integrity.description: Changes were actually applied or saved
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the settings were saved or applied (e.g., clicking a 'Save' or 'Apply' button, or the new names appearing in the main device list outside of the edit mode).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target 1: 'Server Room Camera' must be rotated to 90 degrees and renamed to 'Server Room Camera [Corridor]'. Target 2: 'Entrance Camera' must be rotated to 270 degrees and renamed to 'Entrance Camera [Corridor]'.
